data.title: American Express Q3 Earnings: Profit Beats Estimate, Card Spending Grows, Revises Annual Outlook
data.description: Amex Q2 revenue misses estimate, stock initially rises but gives up gains. Higher net interest income, spending, and fees drive increase. EPS beats estimate. Expenses and credit losses up. FY24 outlook lowered due to inflation, higher rates. Multiple downgrades in Oct. AXP stock up 89% in 1 year.

data.title: Procter & Gamble's Mixed Bag Q1: EPS Exceeds Estimates, Reaffirms Growth Outlook & More
data.description: PG shares up after reporting Q1 FY25 sales of $21.74B, missing consensus estimate. Organic sales grew 2%, adjusted EPS beat. Segment sales varied.
